properties.titulo_evento: Trump turns on Spain and demands Greenland as NATO summit exposes cracks
properties.descricao: The office of Prime Minister Pedro Sanchez said it was treating Trump’s statements as business as usual, adding bilateral relations benefited both nations.

properties.descricao: Experts say the broadcast answers Asia-Pacific military exercises by other countries, warning the U.S. that the weapons could cause pain in any war.

properties.titulo_evento: Deadly strikes in Gaza leave 5 dead, children wounded
properties.descricao: Israeli strikes in Khan Yunis and Gaza City killed five people and wounded others, including children.

properties.descricao: Former Obama official is expected to run for president in 2028, with speech reflecting shifting Democratic sentiments.

properties.descricao: Second night of strikes comes after Trump says ceasefire 'over', suggests talks for lasting peace will continue.

properties.descricao: Trump dominates summit with anti-Europe and Iran diatribes as NATO pledges to expand defence budgets and Ukraine support

properties.titulo_evento: Mass cleanup underway after severe flooding in China
properties.descricao: Residents and volunteers in China’s Guangxi province have begun clearing up their flooded homes.

properties.titulo_evento: Trump says US ‘may take over Kharg Island’: Here’s what you need to know
properties.descricao: Kharg Island, pivotal to Iran's oil exports, becomes focal point as Trump renews threats amid rising Gulf tensions.

properties.titulo_evento: War on Gaza draws large crowds to Khamenei’s funeral in Iraq
properties.descricao: More than a million mourners packed streets in Najaf, Iraq for Iranian Supreme Leader Ali Khamenei’s funeral procession.

properties.titulo_evento: Israeli air strikes in Gaza kill eight, including two children
properties.descricao: Medics report 12 injuries alongside eight deaths in Gaza as Israeli air strikes target civilians and displaced families.

properties.descricao: Women's Super League club lands the two-time Ballon d'Or winner after her exit from Barcelona following a 14-year career.

properties.titulo_evento: France returns Syrian artefacts it’s held since civil war
properties.descricao: France has returned 23 Syrian antique artefacts it’s held since the outbreak of the 2011 civil war.

properties.descricao: Trump says the attacks are "retribution for yesterday's bombing of ships by Iran". Iran earlier promised strong retaliation.

properties.titulo_evento: US strikes target Iranian military boats
properties.descricao: The US has launched the strikes on Iran in response to attacks on three oil tankers in the Strait of Hormuz.

properties.titulo_evento: Ukraine to get licence to produce Patriot missiles, Trump says
properties.descricao: Although the Patriots are highly effective against Russia's ballistic missiles, they also have lengthy production times.

properties.titulo_evento: Khamenei's coffin carried through Shia shrines as ceremonies held in Iraq
properties.descricao: The remains of Iran's late supreme leader are transported to Najaf and Karbala, as funeral ceremonies continue for a fifth day.

properties.descricao: The negotiating process is fragile and recent US strikes show how hard it will be to reach agreement, writes BBC's International Editor Jeremy Bowen.

properties.descricao: Even in Moscow, authorities are unable to guarantee fuel supplies, but will economic pressure lead to talks or escalation?

properties.titulo_evento: Iran war: US launches second wave of strikes in 24 hours

properties.titulo_evento: Iran war: Trump says ceasefire 'over' after fresh strikes
properties.descricao: The US president said it's a "waste of time" dealing with Tehran after the US struck dozens of Iranian targets overnight and again later on Wednesday.

properties.titulo_evento: Trump's support for Venezuela opposition head Machado wanes
properties.descricao: Venezuelan opposition leader and Nobel Peace laureate María Corina Machado says she wants to return to her earthquake-ravaged homeland. Yet neither Venezuela's government nor the United States thinks that's a good idea.

properties.titulo_evento: Fact check: No, Iran did not strike a secret US Gulf base
properties.descricao: With President Trump declaring that the ceasefire is "over" after fresh strikes by Iran, a video goes viral on social media allegedly depicting an attack on a US facility by Iran. The video shows something different.

properties.titulo_evento: Renewed US-Iran war would hit Gulf countries hard
properties.descricao: After US strikes on Iran, Iran targeted US military sites in Bahrain and Kuwait. Even if Iran isn't targeting the governments or populations of its neighbors, Gulf countries have much to lose as fighting escalates.

properties.titulo_evento: How Iran uses the Strait of Hormuz to pressure the US
properties.descricao: Iran's latest attacks show it can easily disrupt shipping, energy markets and draw in Gulf neighbors. DW asks how much leverage Tehran really has over Washington and if its high-risk strategy could backfire.

properties.titulo_evento: Germany: Police arrest suspect after Bavaria school attack
properties.descricao: Authorities say several people have been injured following a reported attack at a school in southern Germany. Two girls were said to have been badly hurt at the school, where a teenage suspect was arrested.

properties.titulo_evento: Attacks on Kyiv ahead of NATO summit: What is Putin's goal?
properties.descricao: Kyiv suffered heavy Russian strikes ahead of the NATO summit in Ankara. Experts say Russian President Vladimir Putin is trying to send a message.

properties.descricao: Kremlin says it will begin importing fuel to stabilize supplies at home.
